title: Perl Weekly Challenge - 020
task1_desc: Write a script to accept a string from command line and split it on change of character. For example, if the string is **"ABBCDEEF"**, then it should split like **"A"**, **"BB"**, **"C"**, **"D"**, **"EE"**, **"F"**.
task1_body: Write a script to accept a string from command line and split it on change of character. For example, if the string is **"ABBCDEEF"**, then it should split like **"A"**, **"BB"**, **"C"**, **"D"**, **"EE"**, **"F"**.
task2_desc: Write a script to print the smallest pair of **Amicable Numbers**. For more information, please checkout wikipedia [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amicable_numbers).
task2_body: Write a script to print the smallest pair of **Amicable Numbers**. For more information, please checkout wikipedia [page](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Amicable_numbers).
